# opnsense_dnsmasq_settings (Resource)

Manages the Dnsmasq DNS/DHCP general settings on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `add_mac` (String) Add requesting MAC to forwarded queries (standard, base64, text).
- `add_subnet` (Boolean) Add the client subnet to forwarded queries.
- `cache_size` (String) DNS cache size (entries).
- `dhcp` (Set of String) DHCP behaviour flags.
- `dhcp_first` (Boolean) Prefer DHCP names over other sources.
- `dns_forward_max` (String) Maximum concurrent forwarded queries.
- `dns_port` (String) DNS listen port.
- `dnssec` (Boolean) Enable DNSSEC validation.
- `domain_needed` (Boolean) Never forward queries without a domain.
- `enable` (Boolean) Enable the Dnsmasq service.
- `interface` (Set of String) Interfaces Dnsmasq listens on (empty = all).
- `local_ttl` (String) TTL for locally-served records.
- `log_queries` (Boolean) Log all DNS queries.
- `no_hosts` (Boolean) Do not read /etc/hosts.
- `no_ident` (Boolean) Disable the chaos TXT ident responses.
- `no_private_reverse` (Boolean) Do not forward reverse lookups for private ranges.
- `no_resolv` (Boolean) Ignore /etc/resolv.conf for upstream servers.
- `port` (String) Service listen port (empty = default).
- `register_dhcp` (Boolean) Register DHCP leases in DNS.
- `register_dhcp_domain` (String) Domain appended to registered DHCP names.
- `register_dhcp_static` (Boolean) Register static DHCP mappings in DNS.
- `strict_bind` (Boolean) Bind only to configured interfaces.
- `strict_order` (Boolean) Query upstream servers in strict order.
- `strip_subnet` (Boolean) Strip the client subnet from replies.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
